title: Saro´s Hud Hide
description: Toggle the entire Minecraft HUD or individual parts with simple commands.
body:
![Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Hud_Hide_Mod/MP_SarosHudHideMod_header.webp)

![Over](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Hud_Hide_Mod/MP_SarosHudHideMod_description.webp)
The **Saro's HUD Manager Mod** provides players with complete control over their Minecraft HUD.  
With a simple set of commands, you can toggle **all HUD elements at once** or manage **individual elements** for a cleaner and more customizable screen.

---

![Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Hud_Hide_Mod/MP_SarosHudHideMod_features.webp)
- **Toggle All Elements** 🖥️
    - Use `/hud all` to enable or disable every HUD element instantly.

- **Toggle Individual Elements** 🎛️
    - Use `/hud <element>` to toggle specific HUD components, with auto-suggestions to guide you.

- **Hide Specific Scoreboards** 📊
    - Use `/hud scoreboard <name>` to hide or show individual scoreboards by their objective name, with auto-suggestions for all available objectives.

- **Clean Interface Control** ✨
    - Perfect for players who want a minimalistic screen during exploration, combat, or recording.

- **Accessible for Everyone** 👥
    - No extra permissions needed – works for all players!

---

![commands](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Hud_Hide_Mod/MP_SarosHudHideMod_commands.webp)
- `/hud all` → Toggle all HUD elements on/off
- `/hud <element>` → Toggle a specific HUD element
  *(Auto-complete shows all available HUD element IDs)*
- `/hud scoreboard <name>` → Hide or show a specific scoreboard by objective name
  *(Auto-complete shows all available scoreboard objectives)*

---

![video](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Hud_Hide_Mod/MP_SarosHudHideMod_youtube.webp)

- Soon
---

![versions](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Hud_Hide_Mod/MP_SarosHudHideMod_versions.webp)
### Currently Supported

- **Forge 1.20.1** ✅

---
